---
title: "Table S1: per-GP summary"
author: "Ziang Zhang"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Produced by
[`script-refactor/TableS1.R`](https://github.com/stephenslab/immgen-t-factors/blob/main/script-refactor/TableS1.R):

```{r table-s1-code, code=readLines("../script-refactor/TableS1.R"), eval=FALSE}
```

## Table {#tables1}

Showing the first 20 rows (of 200); download the full table at
[`figure-refactor/Supplementary_Table1_GP_summary.csv`](https://github.com/stephenslab/immgen-t-factors/blob/main/figure-refactor/Supplementary_Table1_GP_summary.csv).

```{r table-s1-preview, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
tab <- read.csv("../figure-refactor/Supplementary_Table1_GP_summary.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
knitr::kable(head(tab, 20), row.names = FALSE)
```

::: {.figcaption}
**Table S1.** One row per GP: which Level-1 (major lineage), Level-2 (sub-lineage), condition, and organ categories it predicts well (AUC > 0.8, driven by high loading), plus its top 5 positive and negative signature genes (|score| > 0.25).
:::
